title: Thermo UltiMate + Q Exactive: HILIC metabolomics LC-MS (MS setup)
description: Thermo Q Exactive metabolomics setup: HESI positive, R 70k, 80 to 900 m/z, Full MS + ddMS2 (Thermo app note 656).

payload.description: Full MS plus data-dependent MS2 setup for small-molecule / metabolite LC-MS on a Thermo Q Exactive (Orbitrap), fed by the matching HILIC metabolomics LC gradient. HESI-II source, positive polarity. Spray voltage 3.5 kV, capillary temperature 275 C, aux gas heater temperature 350 C. Sheath gas 35, aux gas 8 (arbitrary units); sweep gas not stated. S-lens RF level 50. MS1 resolution 70000, scan range 80 to 900 m/z; MS1 AGC target 1e6, max injection time 250 ms, 1 microscan. Data-dependent MS2: resolution 17500, AGC target 2e5, max injection time 60 ms, isolation window 2.0 Da, normalized collision energy 30 (stepped 50%), dynamic exclusion 6 s. Pair with the matching LC gradient template. Source: Thermo Fisher Application Note 656, https://assets.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/CMD/Application-Notes/AN-656-LC-MSn-Metabolomics-AN64832-EN.pdf . Representative starting-point method, verify against the source and tune per instrument and sample.

source.other_notes: Thermo labels: spray voltage 3.5 kV; capillary temperature 275 C; aux gas heater temperature 350 C. Sheath gas 35, aux gas 8 (arbitrary units); sweep gas not stated. S-lens RF level 50.
